dimensions.evidence: The change makes getTagDef case-insensitive via toLowerCase() on both sides, exactly as the plan prescribed. Tests cover uppercase, mixed-case, lowercase, and nonexistent lookups, matching the acceptance criteria.
Only the two files named in the plan were touched: a one-line logic change in tags.ts and new test cases in tags.test.ts. No unrelated churn.
The fix is genuine — normalizing both sides for comparison. Existing tests are untouched, and new tests exercise real case-insensitive resolution; they would fail without the fix.

Low-risk single-line change: toLowerCase comparison preserves existing lowercase behavior perfectly. No security, correctness, or regression concerns. SSML tag names are case-insensitive by spec; all defined tags are lowercase, so no collision risk.
